name: 17_system_b_met_well_past_threshold_still_breaks
description: Branch 3 / System B: bleed_ticks well past threshold, still increments and still breaks. Confirms no clamp at threshold.
derivation: Outer pass, gate pass. System A: safe_hwm 0.0 >= cross 2.0 FALSE -> vwap_ticks reset. System B: current_return -2.5 <= bleed_arm -1.0 TRUE -> new_bleed_ticks = 8+1 = 9 (NO clamp at threshold). bleed_broken = (9 >= 3) = TRUE. Returns (0, 9, False, True). Catches an impl that clamped bleed_ticks at threshold.
